summary: The diff modifies frontend/src/App.tsx to explicitly enumerate routes without any catch-all or wildcard route, and adds documentation comments explaining that /.well-known/* paths are intentionally excluded from TanStack Router and served as static files. This addresses both REQ-1 and REQ-2. The existing frontend/public/.well-known/ic-domains file is noted as preserved (not modified). The implementation appears complete for both requirements.
